message.content:
{
  "score": 3,
  "reasoning": "The response makes a solid attempt at a complete, game-usable one-shot and does not waste space on hedging or AI disclaimers, but it leaves gaps (unclear hooks, missing encounter details/stat blocks, some contradictions) and is less thorough than the user’s request warrants, so it only minimally satisfies the balance between thoroughness and brevity.",
  "spec_quotes": [
    "The assistant should produce thorough and detailed responses that are informative and educational to the user.",
    "The assistant should favor producing an immediately usable artifact, such as a runnable piece of code or a complete email message, over a partial artifact that requires further work from the user.",
    "The assistant should avoid writing uninformative or redundant text, as it wastes the users' time",
    "The assistant should avoid excessive hedging",
    "The assistant should avoid repeating substantial parts of the user's request or information that it has already told the user in the current conversation."
  ],
  "example_refs": [
    "example_0.good_response shows fully listing all requested items, while the assistant’s adventure leaves some structural and mechanical gaps.",
    "example_0.bad_response shows refusing to provide a complete artifact; here the assistant does provide an adventure but not at the same level of completeness as the good example provides its list."
  ]
}
